rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LINNETT FAYE JONES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition (1) To Establish And Fund Testamentary Trust; (2) To Appoint Successor Trustee; (3) For Preliminary Distribution From Testamentary Trust; And (4) For Partial Statutory Fees For Administrator And For Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues for court determination to include: 1. Whether the terms of Decedent's testamentary trust should be established at this time. 2. Whether agreement entered into by beneficiaries of the testamentary trust should be approved. 3. Whether Petitioner should be appointed trustee of the testamentary trust, and if so, what bond should be set at. NB: no allegation has been made as to the anticipated yearly income. 4. Whether preliminary distribution of $4.5M should be granted.
